title: [MTR4] JR East E233-2000 Series | JR東日本E233系2000番台
description: JR East E233-2000 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The E233-2000 series is a narrow gauge DC electric multiple unit (EMU) operating on the JR East Joban Line. Introduced in 2009, it was built with a narrower body than the other E233 variants for through-running on the Tokyo Metro Chiyoda Line, along with a forward emergency exit door for evacuation in metro tunnels.

This resource pack adds the E233-2000 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with custom model and textures.

There are four types of cars for each variant and you may configure them as you wish.

- Cab forwards
- Trailer
- Pantograph trailer
- Cab backwards
